transcript: Hi guys, welcome back to Cooking with Claudia. Today I'm making chicken parmesan pasta recipe. It is an absolutely incredible pasta recipe and the best part is it's super easy and simple to make. So let's get started. So these are the basic ingredients. I'm using some chopped onions and garlic, chicken broth, red wine, Italian seasoning, brown sugar, red pepper flakes. You're also gonna need some good old cheese. I'm using some Parmesan and mozzarella. I have some uncooked pasta, crushed tomatoes and these are fresh tomatoes. And last I'm using some leftover grilled chicken that I sliced into bite-sized pieces. So pieces so I've heated some oil in a pan and I'm going to cook the chopped onions and garlic till they turn translucent just like that and it's time to add in the crushed tomatoes next add the red wine and don't worry about the alcohol it's going to cook out eventually but it's going to take the flavor to a whole different level next adding the spices and the brown sugar the sugar is going to balance the acidity of the tomatoes and give it a nice taste so cover this up and let this cook on medium heat for about 10 minutes and let the sauce thicken very nicely just like that and now it's time to season this with some salt and it's time to add the grilled chicken and the uncooked pasta and I'm using penne but you can use whatever pasta you have so I just added the chicken broth and now I'm adding some water and mix all that together. So you are going to cover this up and let the pasta slow cook on medium heat for about 10 to 15 minutes just to soak up all that delicious sauce and flavor and I'll show you what to do next. So here we are, the pasta is nicely cooked and al dente. Be sure not to overcook the pasta otherwise it's going to taste boring. So next I'm going to grate in some good old parmesan cheese and some mozzarella cheese. And then you're going to pop this in the oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit just for the cheese to melt and i'll show you what it looks like when it's done and this is it fresh out of the oven it's looking nice smells so good and boy did this taste good i also had some of this the next day for leftovers and it was the best leftover pasta i ever had and if you want the ingredients and measurements check out the description box i have I'll see you next time. the best leftover pasta I ever had and if you want the ingredients and measurements, check out the description box I have everything there I hope you guys try this delicious and simple recipe you may also check out my previous pasta recipes you're going to love them and if you haven't already yet don't forget to subscribe to my channel because I have more delicious recipes to come bye
